description: Gut-and-rebuild of the mcp-kubernetes-platform-engineer repo into a sandbox-verified, GitOps-gated, DPO-learning Kubernetes auto-remediator that beats k8sgpt on the whole remediation loop. Grounded in 480 audit findings (docs/audit-run-001/all-findings.json) and a 25-section PRD (docs/audit-run-001/PRD.md).

userStories.title: Executive summary + roadmap baseline
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I want I have a single authoritative summary and 3-sprint roadmap so that team can plan and review progress against the same north star.
acceptanceCriteria: Deliverables in PRD §01 are implemented or applied
Typecheck passes (mypy src/)
Lint passes (ruff check .)
Unit tests for this story pass (pytest -k <story-keyword> -v)
Runtime validator: at least one real kubernetes client call exercised in test
Integration validator: deployed in a vcluster sandbox before merging to main
Performance validator: handler p95 latency under 2s on stub fixtures
Security validator: no new HIGH/CRITICAL trivy findings; no secrets in diff
CHANGELOG.md updated with version string and summary
Commit message contains version string (Alpha-{build_number}-{sha6}-{maj}-{min}_{patch}-{date})
Author = git config user (not AI/Claude/Anthropic/Cursor)
